source_artifact_distribution: hashes_only; raw research artifacts are not committed

scope.downstream: deterministic morphology controls; not calibrated fab recipes

cmp.plug_connectivity_note: generic analytic-stack floor anchor was below the actual Cu floor; the measured plated-Cu region is one continuous component from the actual fill floor to the CMP endpoint

pattern_bosch_gate0.next_action: Use the full-width fine grid, compare 1,000 versus 2,000 rays, extend mask erosion until survival and failure are both observed, and save each selected shape with the native ViennaPS format.

closest_tested_miss.selection_scope: closest tested corner on the two headline sign ratios; it is a boundary miss, not a recipe ranking

floor_to_lower_flux_ratio.scale: natural log of the regional ratio

floor_to_lower_velocity_ratio.scale: natural log of the regional ratio

cu_transport.scope: descriptive balanced factor/interaction audit of the audited coarse 2D screen; not calibration or qualification

coarse_decision.reason: Both geometry tiers miss the required broad coefficient envelope at grid 0.01, 1000 rays, and maxReflections 400. Confirm selected worst misses at grid 0.005, 2000 rays, and maxReflections 400 versus 800 before pivoting the model family.

decision.reason: The lower-sticking design is a boundary result whose improvement exceeds the largest paired numerical effect, or it passes at the high-fidelity cell. Confirm s=0.00625 at 1600/3200 reflections; do not launch it automatically.

broad_analytic_envelope.evaluation_reason: The broad H/a coefficient envelope was not evaluated because the preliminary floor/lower-wall flux gate did not pass all 8 streams.
The broad H/a coefficient envelope was not evaluated because the preliminary floor/lower-wall flux gate did not pass all 8 streams.

multiresponse_paired_directions.comparison: matched-cap B control versus authoritative C maxReflections=3200

analytic_envelope.evaluation_reason: The broad H/a coefficient envelope was not evaluated because the preliminary floor/lower-wall flux gate did not pass all 8 streams.

decision.reason: Directional floor/lower-wall flux improved in all 8 paired streams, but the worst-response improvement (0.00414659) did not exceed the predeclared numerical envelope (0.0167144). The authoritative arm remains a transport-sign miss; matched 3D is still required before a model-family pivot.

cmp.connectivity_rule: one resolved signed region must connect the via floor to both mouth sides
cmp.feature_resolution_rule: features at or below two grid cells remain unresolved
cmp.reason_doe_blocked: allowable stop-layer and Cu-plug loss thresholds are not yet declared
cmp.model_limit: height and material dependent removal without pad pressure
